description_long: This is a modern, minimalist sofa with a sleek, rectangular silhouette and clean lines. The upholstery is a solid dark gray fabric, appearing smooth and tightly fitted over the frame, with subtle tufting on both the seat and backrest cushions. The sofa features two large, uniform backrest cushions and a single, continuous seat cushion, both of which are attached and not removable. The armrests are straight, low, and square, matching the height of the backrest and maintaining the sofa's boxy profile. Four slender, black legs support the sofa at each corner, slightly elevating it above the ground and giving it a light, airy appearance. This design is well-suited for urban environments such as apartment lobbies, public waiting areas, or modern outdoor patios.
description: A sleek, dark gray modern sofa with straight armrests, attached cushions, and slim black legs, featuring a minimalist and boxy design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width, two backrest cushions, single seat cushion, and both armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the sofa's depth, straight armrest, and slim leg profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the sofa with two large backrest cushions and the rear legs.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the sofa's depth, straight armrest, and slim leg profile, mirroring the left side.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, attached backrest cushions and a single, continuous attached seat cushion; all cushions are uniform in size and feature subtle tufting.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, low, and square armrests at each end, matching the height of the backrest with no visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four slim, straight legs positioned at each corner, likely metal with a black finish, exposed and slightly elevating the sofa.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, and continuous backrest with two large, attached cushions and subtle tufting.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark gray fabric with a smooth, matte finish and subtle tufting on the seat and backrest cushions.
